name: New Pattern Proposal
about: Propose a new pattern for the knowledge base
title: "[Pattern] "
labels: new-pattern, triage
assignees: ""
---

## Pattern Name

<!-- A clear, descriptive name for the pattern -->

## Pillar

<!-- Which pillar does this belong to? -->
<!-- Options: Inference & Serving, Data Patterns, Reliability, Retrieval & Memory, Observability, Security & Trust, Cost & Efficiency, Governance -->

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this pattern solve? What breaks or costs too much without it? -->

## Brief Description

<!-- 2-3 sentences describing the pattern and how it works -->

## Why It Belongs Here

<!-- Why is this a production AI pattern specifically? What makes it distinct from general software patterns? -->

## Evidence of Use

<!-- Where have you seen this pattern used? Link to blog posts, talks, or documentation if available -->

## Willing to Write It?

- [ ] I am willing to write this pattern and submit a PR
- [ ] I am proposing it for someone else to write
